examples: Lucille's home was very grandly called a chateau, though in truth it was nothing more than a large farm.

Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie arrived in Nice on Saturday for their secret wedding, believed to have been held at Chateau Miraval, the property they bought in 2011.
The chateau's property includes an outdoor pool, and French Riviera beaches are within driving distance.
